name: stage2-rvv-route-provider-planning-extraction
title: Stage2 RVV route-provider planning extraction
description: Extract RVV realized typed selected-body route planning from the monolithic EmitC route provider into a plugin-local planning module consumed by the provider.
creator: codex
notes: Provider remains route authority/materialization consumer; extracted planning owner handles route slice collection, typed fact validation, description/intrinsic planning, metadata, and fail-closed diagnostics.
